blocks.content: Eli called a group meeting — his words — at the diner on a Thursday in mid-June. He had a legal pad.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Because it is one. Meilin — tell them.

blocks.speaker: Meilin
blocks.content: He's had this planned since February. I've seen the spreadsheet.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: There's a spreadsheet. Okay. Field behind Kit's block. Starts at six. I've sourced a cooler that is — and I say this with full awareness — unreasonably large. We're talking fireworks, food, the whole group together for the first time since May.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: The field has good sight lines. No trees blocking the sky. Meilin checked the weather — it'll be clear.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: You two are actually perfect for each other and it's slightly terrifying.
Eli smiled at that in a way that made it clear he agreed completely.
He said it without looking at Daisy. She was already nodding.
